text:
厳かな雰囲気ですけど
何が潜んでるかわかりませんわね。
油断大敵ですわ。

……とはいえ、慎重すぎるのも
考え物ですわね。……んー
慎重かつ大胆に行きますわよ！

今回こそ、足手まといにならないよう
私、精一杯

The atmosphere here is pretty impressive, but
who knows what could be hiding around the
corner. Don't let your guard down.

But being TOO careful can cause problems,
too. Hmmm... let's try to be bold but
cautious at the same time!

This time I'll definitely do everything I can
not to slow you down!
